title: OperatorOutput
description:
Standardized agent output for progress tracking and step transitions.

Agents output a status block in their response which is parsed into this structure.
Used for progress tracking, loop detection, and intelligent step transitions.

status.description: Current work status: `in_progress`, complete, blocked, failed

exit_signal.description: Agent signals done with step (true) or more work remains (false)

files_modified.description: Number of files changed this iteration

tests_status.description: Test suite status: passing, failing, skipped, `not_run`

tasks_completed.description: Number of sub-tasks completed this iteration

summary.description: Brief description of work done (max 500 chars)

$comment: AUTO-GENERATED FROM src/rest/dto.rs - DO NOT EDIT. Regenerate with: cargo run -- docs --only operator-output-schema
